## Ownership check

- [ ] SendLens setup doctor, demo mode, local runtime, or MCP server behavior
- [ ] Pluxx-owned portability: host adapter, generated bundle, installer, Windows/macOS/Linux hook behavior, or cross-agent compatibility

If Pluxx-owned, track in the Pluxx team/project rather than fixing in SendLens.

## Public-safe logs

Paste only logs without secrets or private customer data.
